text:
# system info
FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p6 

# CUSTOM KERNEL
include                 GENERIC
ident                   OFL
options                 IPFIREWALL
options                 IPFIREWALL_VERBOSE
options                 IPFIREWALL_DEFAULT_TO_ACCEPT
options                 DUMMYNET
options                 IPDIVERT
options                 CONSPEED=115200
options                 VIMAGE

# cpu info
CPU: Intel(R) Xeon(R) CPU E3-1265L v3 @ 2.50GHz (2500.05-MHz K8-class CPU)
